action: Read _postgres_connect_common.py to understand current env-loading and get_connection() signature.

Modify _postgres_connect_common.py: add DATABASE_URL parsing via urllib.parse.urlsplit; if DATABASE_URL is set, use its components; otherwise fall back to individual AGENT_KB_DB_* vars. Keep get_connection() signature unchanged.

Update SKILL.md: replace 'Set these in the operator's shell profile or in ~/.config/united_agent/.env' with 'The calling agent/client provides these at runtime'; replace 5-var list with DATABASE_URL as primary (with individual vars as optional fallback); update Quickstart to show single export DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/united_agent.

Update README.md For Normal Users and For Server Deployment sections: replace 5 separate export AGENT_KB_DB_* lines with single export DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/united_agent.
Run uv run python -m unittest tests.test_postgres_connect_tooling tests.test_postgres_admin_tooling and confirm all tests pass.
